tagline: Extra bag space, neighbourhood shares, and what you're looking for—all on one map.

hero.body: Offer spare room in luggage on flights you're already taking. Share something from home within your 5 km cell. Or say what you're after—matching trips and nearby offers can find you. Same city-first map, clear profiles, chat down to a simple handoff.

home.editorialTitle: One map. Three ways to meet.
home.editorialBody: Trip capacity, local listings, and open requests all show up on the same discovery surface. Your neighbour might want what's in your tote; someone on your route might have room for what you crave. We make the introduction—the deal stays yours until in-app payments arrive.
home.pillar1Body: You browse by place and corridor—where you are, where you're going—not just a flag on the map.
home.pillar2Body: Publish spare luggage space on trips you already take, or open a request and let offers come to you. Everyday shares use a small finder's fee; trip slots use a fee you agree per slot. Fixed prices today; smarter pricing when we can ship it cleanly.
home.pillar3Body: You agree terms in chat and settle in person or off-platform unless and until regulated in-app payments arrive. We never hold your money today.
home.ctaBandBody: Share what you brought, name what you need, or list trip space as those tools roll out—always within a 5 km cell so meetups stay practical.

country.intro: Bring a taste of {country} to your doorstep.

empty.listings: No local shares in this cell yet—be the first.
empty.requests: No open asks in your radius yet.

kpi.stripFootnote: These numbers describe the curated catalog seed, not live GMV or signups.

mobile.onboardingSubtitle: The same story on web, admin, and here — tuned for thumbs.
mobile.onboardingDiscoverBody: Browse countries and listings in your radius — pins stay inside a 5 km cell.
mobile.onboardingShareBody: Post what you brought back from home with a small finder’s fee for pickup—trips use a separate agreed slot fee when you publish capacity.
mobile.onboardingMeetBody: Message in-app, agree on a café or station, settle in person. We never touch the cash.
mobile.todaySubtitle: Real listings within a 5 km cell of where you are. Pull to refresh.
mobile.emptyHint: Be the first to share — or post a request and we'll ping you when a matching listing or trip offer lands.

profilePanel.approxCityHint: Stored as a 5km cell — never the address.
profilePanel.preferredLanguageHint: Used in emails and the default UI locale.
profilePanel.inboxBody: Matches, trips, and messages land in one place.
profilePanel.blockedBody: People you have blocked cannot message you, and you cannot message them.
profilePanel.gdprBody: You can export everything we hold or delete your account at any moment.
